overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting neon lights, towering buildings with digital billboards, and a distinctive yellow geometric structure. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-fidelity urban environments with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with towering digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a massive concrete building wall

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on buildings across the street
tall poles with bright linear LED lights illuminating the street
multi-lane street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow urban sidewalk at night, flanked by a massive concrete building wall on the left and a wet multi-lane street on the right. Digital billboards glow in the distance while vehicles pass by on the road, their headlights creating streaks of light on the reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated transit overpass

events.description: pedestrian walks toward camera and passes by on the right side
entering the covered area beneath the elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment transitions toward an intersection under an overpass

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera and passing by on the right

entered.detail: elevated transit track with support columns creating a covered corridor
distinctive angular building with yellow facade and cyan accent lighting

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches an intersection, a pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction. The environment transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated overpass, with a striking yellow geometric building becoming visible on the left. The lighting shifts to a mix of overhead street lamps and the glow from distant neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and futuristic commercial buildings

events.description: turning right to cross the multi-lane intersection
waiting for vehicles to pass before continuing across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating the crosswalk across the intersection toward the yellow building

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction toward the yellow building

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
modern building with illuminated windows and ground-floor commercial space
bright vertical neon signage on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection, turning right to cross the street. The distinctive yellow geometric building dominates the left side while modern glass buildings line the right. The camera navigates the crosswalk as vehicles pass by, approaching the other side of the street where another pedestrian walks ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, rain-slicked urban corridor into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins on a sidewalk flanked by a massive concrete wall, moving past reflective pavement where vehicle headlights create streaks of light beneath distant digital billboards. As the camera approaches an intersection and passes a pedestrian, the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated overpass, bringing a striking yellow geometric building into view. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the overpass and turns right to cross a broad street, with the yellow structure dominating the left side against a backdrop of modern glass buildings. Finally, the camera navigates the crosswalk through passing traffic, following another pedestrian toward the far side of the intersection.
